Session
In this training, Teresa is going to give you the final bow to tie on top of your small group, workshop or mastermind. These last few “day of” tips
will help you get the event started on the right foot and get everyone from the attendees to the expert in the right mindset.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Make sure there is appropriate signage pointing people to check in.
Make sure a greeter is there to welcome them, get them signed in and help them get situated in the event room.
Follow along with your agenda, execute massive value and have an amazing day!
